blocks.text: filed it. Cade was protecting someone. Or trying to. He hadn't decided which yet.

blocks.speaker: Inspector Davenport
blocks.content: I asked you not to approach the five.

blocks.speaker: Julian Crane
blocks.content: To tell me the argument wasn't him. Specifically. Unprompted.

blocks.speaker: Julian Crane
blocks.content: The argument through the ceiling — no. But there was another conversation. On the porch earlier. He admitted to that one.

blocks.speaker: Julian Crane
blocks.content: He called it old stuff. Personal.

blocks.speaker: Julian Crane
blocks.content: He said the argument through the ceiling wasn't him. Which means he heard it and knows it wasn't him. Which means he has a theory about who it was.

blocks.prompt: Davenport and Julian are starting to think together. Is that a good thing?

options.label: Yes. Julian needs Davenport to act on what he finds.
Carefully. Davenport has his own agenda and it's not always Julian's.
